headlines.headline: Dralol Computing secures $250M contract with a global retailer

sentiment.reasoning: A 5% drop in new customer orders is a direct negative indicator of demand that will likely weigh on financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
